channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street light is still broken deapite you reporting it as fixed, 23rd June
item.description:
Its flickering on and off. Location is opposite Chad road towards nature reserve

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Griffiths Avenue, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Edge of footbridge damaged, 23rd June
item.description:
Footbridge has been damaged in front of new fencing. Stones missing and stones cut. Footbridge over the stream down the alley from Whitehouse Way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Whitehouse Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown unsafe as elderly could easily fall in the stream and the mess who ever cut the trees down just chucked in silly places use to be so pretty, 23rd June
item.description:
It’s the foot path at what was gypsy corner goes right round the back of the house at GL514AD and also the field footpath is well over grown stringers up to chest height

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lack of grass cutting and maintenance of verges., 23rd June
item.description:
Alongside 1 Tern Court and on the main Innsworth Lane carriage way. 20 years this was maintained by TBC but as not been done this year at all. Why is this not being resolved ?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rookery Road, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped cupboard, 23rd June
item.description:
Still in one piece but dumped on pavement. Has been here a few days. Manchester Way Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Swindon Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley in stream, 23rd June
item.description:
Trolley in benhall stream

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bibury Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree requires immediate tree surgery as affecting my house crown reduction, 23rd June
item.description:
Public footpath from Harp Hill to Oakley Farm. Runs alongside properties in Wessex Drive including my property number 64.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harp Hill Footpath, Battledown, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in the pavement, 23rd June
item.description:
Outside number 7 Jupiter Way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jupiter Way, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pavement is very uneven and dangerous as an elderly gentleman who lives in the lane fell and injured himself, 23rd June
item.description:
The pavement outside 23 and 23C Finchcroft Lane This has got worse over the last few years we have lived here for 5 years

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Finchcroft Lane, Noverton, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Fly Tip reported RP/11399. Reported 27/05/2026 not removed yet, 23rd June
item.description:
The fly-tip was reported on the 27/05/26 with additional information by separate email and telephone call.. The advice was it would be cleared in 5 working days but the tip is still there. As the area is well walked and in the AONB as well as being on the edge of Cleeve Common - can it please be cleared up as soon as possible please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Lane, Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Customer reports that a large Willow tree, on the verge at the location, has a large split in it and is in danger of falling on the carriageway; it appears to be rotten. They have pushed it back into the verge, but it requires felling.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden Rubbish on Pavement, 23rd June
item.description:
Https://w3w.co/crowds.attend.lions The garden rubbish has been outside number eight Gloucester Road for a number of weeks (since at least 6th June). Other recyclables etc have been collected. However, this garden material is not in a brown bin so therefore is not likely to be uplifted.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Gloucester Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Customer has called in and has mentioned that durin the tree works his fence and hedge has been taken out and is wonderign what can be done and the next steps.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Items on Pavement, 23rd June
item.description:
On the corner pavement at the junction of Pates Avenue and Alstone Lane there is a collection of large household items. Unsure if there for scheduled collection by Ubico or not.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Pates Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Cut back hedge to boundary 12mtrs Give and take TM ///clusters.opposites.since (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead squirrel, 23rd June
item.description:
Dead squirrel middle of road in-between 66/64 meadowleaze
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Meadowleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Overgrown Tree FW Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Cut to clear FW (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Overgrown vegetation FW overgrown, to the point it is not passable in places along this stretch. Please cut back to safe. 965m 2 way lights (Embankment & Cuttings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Cut back hedge to boundary 9mtrs Stop and go TM Outside number 11 (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 23rd June
item.description:
Customer has called in and has mentioned that the water pools outside their property and their neighbours , which causes it to floods the houses. The customer is wondering what can be done, She has asked if a drain can be put in possiably?
Report on FixMyStreet
